summary: Workflow YAML is well-crafted with pinned action refs (v4), least-privilege permissions, idempotent steps, and sensible triggers. Good sentinel-based output parsing for test harnesses. However, deliverable is fundamentally incomplete: referenced script `bin/matrix-gen.sh` is missing, no bats test file provided, no test implementation, and no act-result.txt artifact. Workflow references non-existent script (line 43: ./bin/matrix-gen.sh) which would fail on execution. Missing TDD cycle (failing test→implementation→passing tests) and all test harness integration. Production-unshippable as-is.
